duties.d: Process customer payments, manage accounts receivable (AR) collections, and update client payment information.
Monitor design proposals and coordinate associated payments.
Ensure that construction-related payments align with established payment schedules and confirm that client payment information is accurate before work is scheduled.
Review all “Won” proposals for accuracy and completeness.
Confirm that renewable services are not tagged for commission.
Ensure new clients have properly set up accounts in the Aspire system.
Verify that notes and tickets are accurately translated into Spanish.
Support the production team by reviewing job notes for accuracy prior to production meetings.
Scan, track, and report receipts to ensure accurate inventory and expense management.
Track, manage, and maintain office supplies, including mechanic and operational supplies, while ensuring general office cleanliness.
Conduct weekly inventory checks of parts and supplies required for repair and maintenance.
Assist the Production Coordinator with onboarding readiness for new hires.
Handle and oversee budget planning, implementation, and tracking.
Manage weekly payment processing and ensure timely collection of receivables.
Weekly payroll processing and compliance with payroll tax regulations.
Manage and ensure compliance with property tax requirements.
File, process and coordinate H2B applications.
Oversee collection activities and minimize bad debt.
Prepare, analyze, and review financial reports.
Set up of financial related KPI's in Aspire.
Help to develop long-term financial strategies to support business goals.
Using existing and historical Aspire data, perform forecasting, and assist with planning.
Help to identify and mitigate financial risks while managing insurance requirements.
Administer employee benefit plans like health and retirement.
Oversee admin functions including onboarding oversight, updated staff files, insurance and benefits.
Oversee company insurance plans and policies for investments, fleet, workers comp, property, benefits, audits, unemployment.

children.name: Brian Baur
children.title: Vice President of Sales & Customer Care

duties.d: Assist in answering and returning calls during busy periods, responding to inquiries within 1 hour during business hours and within 24 hours after business hours, ensuring exceptional customer service and satisfaction.
Oversee the onboarding process for new clients, ensuring a comprehensive understanding of services, schedules, and communication protocols.
Investigate and respond to billing-related questions.
Maintain and manage updated records of leads, inquiries, complaints, reviews, and referral sources to support overall customer relationship management.
Ensure that Aspire tags for clients are accurate and up to date, providing oversight for effective tracking and service provision.
Monitor and manage the progress of client-centered tasks within the Aspire system, ensuring that all tasks are aligned with client needs and company objectives.
Investigate customer issues, collaborating with operations and account managers to resolve them, and following up with clients to ensure their satisfaction and closure of issues.
Send review links and encourage clients to document their positive experiences as 5-star reviews on Google and social media, contributing to brand reputation and visibility.
Work closely with the sales team to develop strategies to retain clients considering cancellation; assist in processing cancellations and managing related communications if retention is unsuccessful.
Oversee the deactivation of properties following confirmed cancellations, ensuring no work is scheduled, and final payments are processed efficiently.
Collaborate with management to develop strategies aimed at improving customer retention and increasing satisfaction, documenting customer feedback and concerns to enhance communication processes.
Mentor Customer Care Assistants, providing guidance on handling complex customer interactions and ensuring consistent messaging.

Achieve a sales goal of $1.6 million for 2026. For inquiries related to enhancement and construction jobs exceeding $10,000, these will be reassigned to the landscape design team. All maintenance inquiries will be the responsibility of the maintenance account managers, and any enhancement job beyond their scope will be assigned to the designers.

duties.h: New Business and Legacy Client Management
duties.d: Identify, cultivate, and pursue new business opportunities while maintaining and developing relationships with existing clients.
Create and present lawn and landscape maintenance proposals upon request, ensuring completion within 48 hours or less of client inquiry.
Address and respond promptly to client concerns, proactively escalating and coordinating with operations for resolution as needed.
Exhibit strong follow-through and impressive communication skills, both verbal and written, ensuring client satisfaction and operational clarity.
Oversee enhancement installations and maintenance services provided by the team to ensure quality and adherence to client expectations.
Measure properties and aid with customer maintenance contract renewals to sustain a long-term client base.
Work closely with the management team to confirm that all tasks are completed accurately and meet prescribed quality standards.
Act as a professional representative of the company, exhibiting courtesy and reinforcing the company’s reputation in all client and community interactions.
Achieve a sales goal of $1.2 million for 2026.

Design and sell residential or commercial landscape projects, including outdoor living areas, softscapes, hardscapes, ponds, and lighting systems, to builders, developers, homeowners, and small business owners.
Conduct onsite consultations and site inspections to gather requirements and assess soil type, slope, drainage, exposure, and the impact of existing structures or utilities on project development.
Prepare and present professional proposals that align with company margins, and maintain all proposals in progress while following up to maximize sales opportunities.
Ensure work is sold within approved margin guidelines to achieve targeted job costs and desired profit margins.
Respond promptly to all inquiries and bid requests.
Manage projects to meet desired outcomes, ensure client satisfaction, and collaborate with clients and teams for successful project completion.
Supervise job site crews to ensure proper execution from start to finish.
Order and schedule materials for delivery, track their usage, and monitor labor and costs to keep projects within budget.
Provide leadership and coordinate with on-site staff, subcontractors, and office teams to maintain quality and customer satisfaction.
Review project progress regularly to ensure deadlines are consistently met.
Investigate and resolve customer complaints promptly.
Attend weekly management meetings to review project progress and schedules.
Report any damage to company assets promptly and ensure compliance with standard operating procedures (SOPs).
Assign maintenance inquiries to maintenance account managers and manage enhancement jobs that exceed their scope.
Develop and execute the overarching sales strategy to achieve targets across all divisions, including maintenance, treatments, and landscape construction services.

Oversee a structured sales team with individual sales goals. Monitor and report daily, weekly, and monthly sales performance to ensure alignment with sales targets and company objectives. Review sales pipelines regularly to track proposal opportunities, address missed deals, and proactively manage proposal flow to achieve targets.

Lead and manage the customer care department to ensure seamless client onboarding, effective communication, and outstanding service delivery. Focus on building long-term customer satisfaction and improving retention through proactive leadership.

Foster a strong partnership between sales and operations to ensure cohesive service delivery. Resolve client concerns by working directly with operations to implement best practices and refine processes for greater efficiency.

Plan and implement comprehensive training programs for both sales and client care teams, from onboarding to advanced skills development. Collect feedback from staff and clients to identify areas for improvement and continuously enhance training and processes. Conduct regular performance audits to ensure accountability, profitability, and skill elevation across the team.

Define and monitor key performance indicators (KPIs) to track sales, crew efficiency, client satisfaction and service quality. Use data-driven insights to set team benchmarks and identify opportunities for improvement.

Build and maintain strong relationships with key clients to enhance long-term retention. Proactively resolve client concerns and identify upselling and cross-selling opportunities to provide additional value and grow revenue.

Collaborate with the marketing team to align sales strategies with marketing campaigns and materials, creating cohesive customer messaging and maximizing reach. Understand campaign effectiveness, and monitor ROI, sharing updates with team. Plan and execute theme-based campaigns, preparing teams to participate in strategic marketing efforts. Use marketing strategies as a growth engine by fostering collaboration between the sales and marketing teams to achieve measurable outcomes.

Create and maintain accountability structures to track progress toward sales and customer care goals and ensure timely and effective team performance. Manage and resolve escalated client-related issues promptly to maintain customer relationships.
Collaborate with scheduling and operations teams to accurately plan workforce capacity.

Streamline the job costing process into a single ownership framework, centralizing efforts currently divided among various team members. Track key metrics—including Cost of Goods Sold (COGS), labor efficiency, and budget vs. actual audits—to enhance financial performance and operations. Promote pre- and post-job analytics to document successes, assess challenges, and improve future job estimates. Transition estimating practices toward a preventative strategy to anticipate and address profitability issues before they arise.

duties.h: Field Operations and Quality Control Oversight
duties.d: Manage the daily execution and conduct regular inspections of maintenance and snow services to ensure contract adherence and high-quality work. Communicates with Production Coordinator on all maintenance related scheduling goals, weather adjustments, delays. Point of contact for all job specific questions from crew leaders.
Train, lead, supervise, and develop landscape crews on-site, providing guidance and hands-on training to ensure efficient operations, quality service, and professional growth.

Provide training for crew members on truck and trailer driving, as well as the operation of equipment such as front loader, skid steer, dingo, mowers, blowers, trimmers, chainsaws, sod cutters, aerators, mulch blowers, plows, and salters.

Enforce safety regulations and industry standards on job sites through diligent preparation (e.g., use of caulk blocks and safety cones). Conduct branch, driving and jobsite safety audits and provide ongoing team training.
Optimize jobsite labor and equipment allocation for maximum productivity, while ensuring the proper use, operation, and maintenance of landscaping tools and machinery.
Promote sustainable landscaping methods by overseeing environmentally responsible practices and implementing the latest techniques to improve service quality and efficiency.
Collaborate with the Operations Manager to ensure timely responses and resolutions to service call requests.
Collect client feedback after service completion and implement improvements based on their input to maintain satisfaction and enhance service quality.
Work closely with the operations team and other departments to align maintenance services with overall business objectives and client expectations.
Perform pre-trip inspections and ensure all trucks, trailers, and equipment are in proper working condition, ready for operations, and compliant with safety standards.
Collaborate with the Operations Manager to establish and adhere to a maintenance schedule for trucks and equipment.
Perform proactive and timely repairs on all trucks, trailers, and job-related equipment.
Ensure all vehicles and equipment meet safety and operational standards in accordance with local, state, and federal regulations, including DOT requirements.
Provide on-call support for emergency repairs, assisting teams on-site with troubleshooting and resolving equipment issues promptly.
Collaborate with the Operations team to train landscaping crews on proper equipment operation, care, and basic troubleshooting to prevent misuse and extend equipment lifespan.
Work with vendors to source parts, negotiate pricing, and ensure timely delivery of supplies to reduce repair delays.
Identify and implement cost-saving measures, such as repairing components instead of replacing them and recommending energy-efficient or low-maintenance equipment upgrades.
Utilize the company’s purchase order system for all purchases and obtain sign-off from the Operations Manager before making any purchases.
Keep accurate and up-to-date records of fleet maintenance and repairs for compliance and reporting purposes.
Assist with loading/unloading materials, manage green waste disposal, and transport hardscape spoils offsite as needed to support overall yard operations.
Support the transportation of assets, equipment, and materials to job sites when required.
Responsible for hires related to maintenance and construction including field level managers.
Plan and implement training programs. Develop safety plans, establish, and refine standard operating procedures (SOPs). Ensure team compliance with the company’s standards and practices.

Set production goals based on budget and oversee daily operations (e.g., 15-minute morning dispatch, end-of-day loading, GPS monitoring). Manage staffing schedules and time-off requests to ensure smooth workflows.
Manage safety sign-off sheets and verify field crew participation. Maintain safety records to ensure full compliance across the team.
Troubleshoot any landscape, hardscape, planting, lawn installation, or damage caused during work and ensure resolution.

Establish and oversee key performance indicators (KPIs) such as productivity rates, job costs, labor efficiency, and revenue per crew. Monitor performance to ensure adherence to sales, maintenance, and production goals.
Oversee the execution and profitability of construction and maintenance projects.

Supervise mechanic activities related to the maintenance and care of trucks, trailers, and equipment, ensuring that all repairs and maintenance tasks are executed effectively and efficiently. Oversee an organized system for checking, tracking, and returning tools to minimize waste or loss. Evaluate and make decisions on quotes and purchase orders to ensure alignment with the annual budget, prioritizing cost-efficiency and resource allocation.

duties.h: Shop, Grounds, and Fleet Cleanliness Oversight
duties.d: Oversee the cleanliness and organization of the shop, surrounding grounds, and fleet to meet safety, efficiency, and presentation standards.
Manage and oversee conflict resolution among team members.
Oversee daily operations of the lawn, pest, and plant health division, ensuring alignment with company goals and standards.
Collaborate with the customer care team to handle inquiries and resolve complaints. Conduct site visits and provide guidance on best practices for lawn care, pest management, and plant health.
Assist with hiring, onboarding, training, scheduling, and performance evaluations to build a skilled and efficient team.
Ensure adherence to local, state, and federal regulations, including pesticide application laws, OSHA standards, and environmental guidelines.
Enforce safety protocols, conduct routine inspections, and ensure the proper use of personal protective equipment (PPE).
Provide hands-on training to staff on proper application techniques, equipment usage, and safety practices to maintain high service quality.
Schedule treatment assignments for specialists to ensure efficient and timely service delivery.
Conduct audits of work to uphold service quality standards, offering feedback to specialists and corrective actions as needed.
Oversee key performance indicators (KPIs) such as productivity rates, job costs, labor efficiency, and revenue per crew, monitoring performance to meet sales and production goals.
Collaborate with leadership to develop and manage the division’s budget and cost control.
Collaborate with President and VP of Sales to identify and leverage new market opportunities.
Weekly documentation of inventory of supplies, including fertilizers, pesticides, and herbicides, ensuring proper storage and weekly updates.
Ensure that all team initiatives and projects support the company's vision and mission.
Delegate day-to-day operational decisions and responsibilities to department heads while maintaining oversight and accountability to empower team leadership.
Collaborate with our CFO to develop financial forecasts that support strategic planning and informed decision-making.
Set objectives and provide direction for the marketing team, guiding plans for web, social, and advertising strategies.
Schedule and attend regular budget review meetings to assess performance, make necessary adjustments, and ensure fiscal responsibility.
Define and review key performance indicators (KPIs) for operations, sales, production, and marketing to measure and ensure success.
Assess sales and operational processes to identify inefficiencies, implement best practices, and streamline workflows.
Foster collaboration between departments (sales, operations, and customer care) by establishing clear communication channels and aligning shared goals.
Ensure training programs across sales, production, and customer care teams are aligned with company goals. Support leadership in implementing these programs.
Develop systems and processes to gather feedback from team members, clients, and stakeholders to identify areas for improvement and enhance decision-making.
Oversee market research efforts to stay informed of trends, customer preferences, and competitive positioning to guide strategy discussions with senior leadership.
Establish clear accountability frameworks for the leadership team to ensure projects and goals are completed on time and within budget.
Invest in leadership training and mentorship opportunities for department heads to prepare them for greater autonomy and responsibility.
Stay informed about industry changes and opportunities for innovation. Support teams in proposing and evaluating initiatives for growth and expansion.
